ddls:
CREATE TABLE "wine_batches" (
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wine batch */,
  "vineyard_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vineyard where the grapes were harvested */,
  "harvest_year" INTEGER /* Year the grapes were harvested */,
  "bottling_date" TEXT /* Date the batch was bottled */,
  "batch_size" INTEGER /* Total size of the batch in liters */,
  "wine_type" TEXT /* Type of wine (e.g., red, white, rosé) */,
  "batch_status" TEXT /* Current status of the batch (e.g., in production, bottled, distributed) */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date when the batch was produced */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected date of delivery to the market */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual date of delivery to the market */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the batch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("batch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wine_batches_vineyard_id FOREIGN KEY ("vineyard_id") REFERENCES vineyards ("vineyard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vineyards" (
  "vineyard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vineyard */,
  "vineyard_name" TEXT /* Name of the vineyard */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the vineyard */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the vineyard */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the vineyard in hectares */,
  "establishment_year" INTEGER /* Year the vineyard was established */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Name of the vineyard owner */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the vineyard */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Any certifications the vineyard holds (e.g., organic, biodynamic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vineyard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chemical_compositions" (
  "composition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chemical composition record */,
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine batch the composition data belongs to */,
  "fixed_acidity" REAL /* Fixed acidity of the wine */,
  "volatile_acidity" REAL /* Volatile acidity of the wine */,
  "citric_acid" REAL /* Citric acid content of the wine */,
  "residual_sugar" REAL /* Residual sugar content of the wine */,
  "chlorides" REAL /* Chloride content of the wine */,
  "free_sulfur_dioxide" REAL /* Free sulfur dioxide content of the wine */,
  "total_sulfur_dioxide" REAL /* Total sulfur dioxide content of the wine */,
  "density" REAL /* Density of the wine */,
  "pH" REAL /* pH level of the wine */,
  "sulphates" REAL /* Sulphate content of the wine */,
  "alcohol" REAL /* Alcohol content of the wine */,
  "tannin_level" REAL /* Tannin content of the wine */,
  "color_intensity" REAL /* Color intensity of the wine */,
  "aroma_intensity" REAL /* Aroma intensity of the wine */,
  "flavor_profile" TEXT /* Flavor profile of the wine (e.g., fruity, floral, woody) */,
  "sample_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was taken for analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("composition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chemical_compositions_batch_id FOREIGN KEY ("batch_id") REFERENCES wine_batches ("batch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality rating */,
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine batch the rating belongs to */,
  "quality_score" INTEGER /* Quality score of the wine (1-10) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "taster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the taster who rated the wine */,
  "taster_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments from the taster */,
  "rating_source" TEXT /* Source of the rating (e.g., internal, external, customer) */,
  "rating_method" TEXT /* Method used for rating (e.g., sensory, chemical) */,
  "rating_scale" TEXT /* Scale used for rating (e.g., 1-10, 1-100) */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the rating (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_ratings_batch_id FOREIGN KEY ("batch_id") REFERENCES wine_batches ("batch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_ratings_taster_id FOREIGN KEY ("taster_id") REFERENCES tasters ("taster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasters" (
  "taster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each taster */,
  "taster_name" TEXT /* Full name of the taster */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the taster */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise (e.g., red wine, white wine) */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience as a taster */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Any certifications the taster holds (e.g., Master Sommelier) */,
  "last_training_date" TEXT /* Date of the last training session attended by the taster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("taster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., quality analyst, production manager, executive) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object to store user permissions (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine batch being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action performed (e.g., specific fields viewed or edited) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_batch_id FOREIGN KEY ("batch_id") REFERENCES wine_batches ("batch_id")
)
